title: The Barbarians
writer: John Lee Mahin, Martin Rackin, Francis Van Wyck Mason
actors: Jack Palance, Milly Vitale, Guy Rolfe
plot: Revak is an Iberian prince from Penda, a small island where the Carthagian fleet ransacked and enslaved the surviving native men, including him. After an eventful passage aboard a galley, Revak becomes an elephant driver in Cartha...
